title: Netball World Cup 2023: South Africa score in last second to draw with New Zealand
paragraphs: Watch South Africa score in the dying seconds to earn a dramatic 48-48 draw with New Zealand at the Netball World Cup.
REPORT: Hosts South Africa draw thriller with New Zealand
Follow live coverage of the Netball World Cup on BBC iPlayer, BBC Sport website and app from Monday, 31 July - Sunday, 6 August.
